parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile', max_tokens: 1500, temperature: 0.3, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are Mycroft, an expert AI investment analyst. You always respond with valid, parseable JSON only. No markdown code blocks, no preamble, no trailing text outside the JSON.' }, { role: 'user', content: $json.ai_prompt }] }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
// ─── DB PREP: Sanitise and structure data for PostgreSQL insertion ─────────────
// NOTE: For production use, replace string interpolation with parameterised queries.
const d = $input.first().json;

// Safe string escape for SQL (MVP-grade — use pgp or parameterised queries in prod)
const esc = (v) => String(v ?? '').replace(/'/g, "''");

const inputParamsJson       = esc(JSON.stringify({
  revenue_growth:      d.revenue_growth,
  sentiment_score:     d.sentiment_score,
  pe_ratio:            d.pe_ratio,
  debt_equity:         d.debt_equity,
  current_price:       d.current_price,
  market_cap_billions: d.market_cap_billions
}));

const simResultsJson = esc(JSON.stringify({
  sim1: d.sim1_growth_sentiment,
  sim2: d.sim2_risk_appetite,
  sim3: d.sim3_threshold_break,
  aggregate: d.aggregate
}));

const aiInsightsJson = esc(JSON.stringify(d.ai_insights || {}));

const dbQuery = `
INSERT INTO mycroft_whatif_simulations (
  simulation_id,
  company,
  ticker,
  risk_appetite,
  time_horizon,
  final_recommendation,
  confidence_pct,
  aggregate_score,
  bubble_risk_score,
  stability_score,
  input_params,
  simulation_results,
  ai_insights,
  ai_verdict
) VALUES (
  '${esc(d.simulation_id)}',
  '${esc(d.company)}',
  '${esc(d.ticker)}',
  '${esc(d.risk_appetite)}',
  '${esc(d.time_horizon)}',
  '${esc(d.aggregate.final_recommendation)}',
  ${d.aggregate.confidence_pct},
  ${d.aggregate.score},
  ${d.sim1_growth_sentiment.bubble_risk_score},
  ${d.sim3_threshold_break.stability_score},
  '${inputParamsJson}'::jsonb,
  '${simResultsJson}'::jsonb,
  '${aiInsightsJson}'::jsonb,
  '${esc(d.ai_insights?.mycroft_verdict || '')}'
)
ON CONFLICT (simulation_id) DO UPDATE
  SET ai_verdict = EXCLUDED.ai_verdict,
      final_recommendation = EXCLUDED.final_recommendation
RETURNING id, simulation_id;
`.trim();

return [{ json: { ...d, db_query: dbQuery } }];
